name: next-nf
description: AI skills for the next-nf open-source 3GPP mobile core (Erlang/OTP) — shared conventions and per-component knowledge for working on the SMF/PGW, UDR/HSS, PCF/PCRF, and CHF.

plugins.name: nf-docs
plugins.description: Org-wide operator-documentation standard for next-nf network functions — an ETSI-derived house style with copy-in templates for configuration, interface, runbook, troubleshooting, and diagram docs.
